{{Infobox group
| name = Li clan
| introduced = cradle-01-unsouled
}}

''See also: [[Li clan Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Li]] clan is a family located in [[Sacred Valley]] that has experienced a decline in status, falling outside the top ten families of the region. They are characterized by their sophisticated and ostentatious displays, often utilizing music from skilled performers and colorful [[Remnants]]—such as silver butterflies, [[jade]] hawks, and crimson eagles—to create elaborate visual tapestries in the sky. Their members are known for wearing significant amounts of gold, silver, and precious jewels to signal their rank; for instance, [[Jade]]-stage elders may wear multiple rings on their fingers and ears. While some view this behavior as a sign of arrogance and vanity that could lead to their downfall, the clan maintains a significant presence through its possession of numerous flying chariots and clouds. The clan's leadership includes a Matriarch, various elders, and highly skilled specialists like the [[Forger]] [[Shao]]. Historically, the clan has been associated with figures such as [[Li Markuth]], a [[Grand Elder]] who sought to restore the family to its former glory and challenge the dominance of the [[Wei clan]].}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Li]] clan, which features a [[Grand Patriarch]] and various experts, made no efforts to increase its power prior to the [[Festival]]. Represented by the colors green and gray in the [[arena]], the clan is led by [[Grand Patriarch]] [[Li Markuth]]. During his leadership, the [[Grand Patriarch]] demonstrated his power by summoning dark clouds.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Li clan]] has not made any motion to improve its strength before the [[Festival]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c6">''Unsouled'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Li clan]]'s color in the [[arena]] is green and gray.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c7">''Unsouled'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Li clan]] has experts and a [[Grand Patriarch]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c9">''Unsouled'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Li]] Clan is led by [[Grand Patriarch]] [[Li Markuth]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c10">''Unsouled'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Grand Patriarch]] of the [[Li]] Clan summoned dark clouds.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c11">''Unsouled'', chapter 11</ref>}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Located to the south of the valley, the [[Li]] clan is a group visited by [[Lindon]]. The settlement is enclosed by walls of smooth, pale, polished wood that feature functional script decorations. Led by a Matriarch and including a Fourth [[Elder]], the clan is known to participate in the [[Seven-Year Festival]]. Although [[Lindon]] initially held negative impressions, he found the clan was not as bad as he had expected. However, a member of the clan eventually collapsed while bleeding from his eyes.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Li clan]] is a group [[Lindon]] needs to visit.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c9">''Bloodline'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Li clan]] is located to the south of the valley.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Li clan]] is surrounded by a wall of smooth, pale, polished wood decorated with functional script.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c10">''Bloodline'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Li clan]] is led by a Matriarch.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Li clan]] participated in the [[Seven-Year Festival]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c11">''Bloodline'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Li clan]] has a Fourth [[Elder]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c13">''Bloodline'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Li clan]] has wooden walls.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Li clan]] was not as bad as [[Lindon]] had said.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c16">''Bloodline'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|A man from the [[Li clan]] collapsed with blood running from his eyes.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c17">''Bloodline'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Jaran]] has an acid burn from the [[Li clan]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c5">''Reaper'', chapter 5</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Li clan]] has a Grand [[Hall]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c35">''Waybound'', chapter 35</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Li Markuth]] is the [[Grand Elder]] of the [[Li clan]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c35" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Li clan]] has [[Elders]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c35" />}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Li clan]] is no longer among the top ten families in [[Sacred Valley]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c8">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 8</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|“The Li clan has made no motion to improve its strength before the Festival, and that worries me most of all.”<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c6" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|“The Matriarch has arrived,” one of the guards announced from the top of the wall<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c10" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
